metadata.description: Skill-based pipeline for creating AEM Edge Delivery Services websites from brand guidelines. Composes superpowers, impeccable, and Adobe EDS skills.

plugins.name: stardust
plugins.description: Two-phase pipeline for AEM EDS websites. Design phase (EDS-agnostic): brand, briefings, wireframes (optional), design. EDS phase: eds-design, eds-build, eds-refine. 8 skills: /stardust (navigator), /stardust:brand, /stardust:briefings, /stardust:wireframes, /stardust:design, /stardust:eds-design, /stardust:eds-build, /stardust:eds-refine.
